title: PDF Viewer: remove grey dead space + fit without clip
description:
Grey area between/outside sheets was the default map scroll background showing through an oversized flex scroll container. Viewer scroll now shrink-wraps to the sheet stack height with a forced white background.

Fit-to-width adds a 3.5% safety margin plus scrollbar/inset so sheets do not clip at 100% browser zoom. Page stack uses intrinsic piece dimensions by page index to eliminate inflated vertical gaps.

Hard-refresh PipeSync after deploy (dbg62).

Who is affected: Private OVH server.
changeLog: Kill grey scroll dead space: shrink-wrap scroll to stack height, white bg.
Force viewer page h/w from intrinsic piece size every normalize.
Fit-to-width safety margin prevents edge clipping at 100% zoom.
Match legacy pieces by page index for correct sheet dimensions.
